notes: Unit declares no tables_columns.reuse[] and no tables_columns.new[]. The logic implicitly writes to telemetry_events, telemetry_daily_summary, and iot_devices, all defined by depended-on units (E-045, E-047). Schema correctness for those tables is enforced by the audits of E-045 and E-047.
